name: GHXTox 3D-v2 + ToxPLTC-derived pooled ProtT5 hybrid default

structure_expert.inputs: ESM2 sequence Transformer + pLDDT-aware C-alpha EGNN + all-atom chemical-site residual

prott5_expert.augmentation: 1:1 Borderline-SMOTE fitted inside each training fold

fusion.selection: leave-one-group-fold-out MCC optimization on training OOF only

inference.fallback_reason: the 0.62/0.38 weight was validated for full 3D-v2, not the historical 3D-v1 fallback
